name: IR

values.name: dict
values.type: IR.Codec comparable -> IR.Codec v -> IR.Codec (Dict.Dict comparable v)

values.name: field
values.type: (input -> field) -> IR.Codec field -> IR.RecordCodecBuilder input (field -> output) -> IR.RecordCodecBuilder input output

values.name: map
values.type: (a -> b) -> (b -> a) -> IR.Codec a -> IR.Codec b

values.name: result
values.type: IR.Codec x -> IR.Codec a -> IR.Codec (Result.Result x a)

values.name: triple
values.type: IR.Codec a -> IR.Codec b -> IR.Codec c -> IR.Codec ( a, b, c )

values.name: tuple
values.type: IR.Codec a -> IR.Codec b -> IR.Codec ( a, b )

values.name: variant0
values.type: output -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder (IR.Adapter.IR -> input) variantType output -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder input () output

values.name: variant1
values.type: (arg1 -> output) -> IR.Codec arg1 -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder ((arg1 -> IR.Adapter.IR) -> input) variantType output -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder input () output

values.name: variant2
values.type: (arg1 -> arg2 -> output) -> IR.Codec arg1 -> IR.Codec arg2 -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder ((arg1 -> arg2 -> IR.Adapter.IR) -> input) variantType output -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder input () output

values.name: variant3
values.type: (arg1 -> arg2 -> arg3 -> output) -> IR.Codec arg1 -> IR.Codec arg2 -> IR.Codec arg3 -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder ((arg1 -> arg2 -> arg3 -> IR.Adapter.IR) -> input) variantType output -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder input () output

values.name: variant4
values.type: (arg1 -> arg2 -> arg3 -> arg4 -> output) -> IR.Codec arg1 -> IR.Codec arg2 -> IR.Codec arg3 -> IR.Codec arg4 -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder ((arg1 -> arg2 -> arg3 -> arg4 -> IR.Adapter.IR) -> input) variantType output -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder input () output

values.name: variant5
values.type: (arg1 -> arg2 -> arg3 -> arg4 -> arg5 -> output) -> IR.Codec arg1 -> IR.Codec arg2 -> IR.Codec arg3 -> IR.Codec arg4 -> IR.Codec arg5 -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder ((arg1 -> arg2 -> arg3 -> arg4 -> arg5 -> IR.Adapter.IR) -> input) variantType output -> IR.CustomCodecBuilder input () output
